title: Endnomy
body:
# Endnomy Mod

![Endnomy Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zXyGSXrp/images/5f9f281a61c4e576a856d304593100c403aa520a.jpeg)

---

> Mod created mainly for EnderSMP server.
> 
> This mod adds money and card items. ATM block. Commands.
> 
> Card recipe: (in line) Gold Ingot + Paper + Gold Ingot -> Card.


---

**Current way to get money is from advancements (MORE WAYS COMING SOON)**
<details>
<summary>Advancement list and rewards</summary>

1. First join - **128**.
2. Adventuring time - **128**.
3. Kill a mob near sculk catalyst - **12**.
4. Monsters hunter (kill one of every hostile monster) - **32**.
5. Bullseye - **32**.
6. Sniper duel - **32**.
7. Hero of the village - **32**.
8. Trim with all exclusive armor patterns (spire, snout, rib, ward, silence, vex, tide, wayfinder) - **192**.
9. Two birds, one arrow (kill 2 phantoms with one piercing arrow) - **128**.
10. Arbalistic (kill five unique mobs with one crossbow shot) - **96**.
11. Free the end (kill dragon) - **128**.
12. Levitate 50 blocks from shulker's attack - **32**.
13. Return the sender (kil ghast from it's own fireball) - **16**.
14. Uneasy alliance (bring ghast to overworld and then kill it) - **128**.
15. Subspace bubble (use nether to travel 7 km in the overworld) - **64**.
16. A furious cocktail (have every potion effect applied at the same time) - **128**.
17. How did we get here? (have every effect applied at the same time) - **256**.
18. Hot tourist destinations (explore all nether biomes) - **64**.
19. Cover me in debris (get full suit of netherite armor) - **128**.
20. Serious dedication (craft netherite hoe) - **64**.
21. A balanced diet (eat everything that is edible) - **128**.
22. With our powers combined (have all frog lights in your inventory) - **128**.
23. A complete catalogue (tame all cat variants) - **128**.
24. Two by two (breed all the animals) - **256**.

**ALL: 2460**.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Command list</summary>

- `/pay [player] [amount]` - Pay other player from your bank account.
- `/setmoney [player] [amount]` - Set specified player's bank account's money.
- `/resetadvancementvalue [player]` - Resets logic variable for specified player's advancements to *false*. IF YOU DO NOT KNOW WHAT YOU ARE DOING, DO NOT USE IT!

</details>

---


## Credits:

> Endas (Enadas) - Made mod, made textures, made models.
> 
> EnderSMP community - Encouraged to make the mod.
> 
> MCreator - Compiled the mod.
